message:
fix(labels,storage,sync): label dedup and rename hardening, comment parsing safety, and transactional export finalization

Label Handling Hardening:
- label_rename: early return when old_name == new_name with proper output
  for JSON, rich, and plain modes; new render_rename_noop_rich helper
- set_labels: deduplicate input labels via dedupe_preserving_order() helper;
  skip DB writes entirely when labels already match; detect and normalize
  pre-existing duplicate labels in the database with event recording
- rename_label storage method: early return for same-name rename
- Tests: test_set_labels_deduplicates_input, test_rename_label_same_name_is_noop

Comment Parsing Safety:
- Extract shared comment_from_row() function replacing three inline copies
  in get_comments, fetch_comment, and get_all_comments_for_issues
- All fields now return explicit errors (ok_or_else) instead of silently
  defaulting to "" or 0; timestamp parse errors include comment ID
- insert_comment_row validates last_insert_rowid is positive
- Test: test_get_comments_errors_on_invalid_timestamp

Transactional Export Finalization:
- finalize_export wraps all DB writes (clear_dirty_issues, set_export_hashes,
  set_metadata x2) in BEGIN IMMEDIATE / COMMIT with ROLLBACK on failure,
  calling _in_tx storage method variants for atomicity
- Test: test_finalize_export_rolls_back_on_failure verifies dirty flags and
  metadata are not partially committed when export_hashes table is dropped

Code Quality:
- follow_redirects: replace !x.is_some_and with x.is_none_or (more idiomatic)
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on issue before mutation and on db_path in test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
